decks.notes: This Mono Black Aggro deck focuses on early aggression and disruption to overwhelm the opponent. The key strategy is to quickly deploy threats like Hypnotic Specter and Nantuko Shade, while utilizing cards like Duress and Cabal Therapy to disrupt the opponent's hand. The deck also includes removal spells like Snuff Out and Smother to deal with opposing threats. Mishra's Factory provides additional creature threats, and Wasteland can disrupt the opponent's mana base. Overall, the deck aims to apply pressure and disrupt the opponent's game plan to secure a quick victory.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly assemble the combo of Phyrexian Dreadnought and Stifle to create a powerful threat that can be difficult for opponents to deal with. The deck includes various counterspells and card draw spells to help protect the combo pieces and find them efficiently. Additionally, cards like Gush and Foil provide additional card advantage while also allowing for flexibility in playing spells. The deck aims to control the tempo of the game and win through the powerful synergies of the combo pieces.

Utilizing the graveyard as a resource, this Full English Breakfast Combo deck aims to quickly assemble the combo pieces needed to create an infinite mana loop and win the game. Cards like Survival of the Fittest, Hermit Druid, and Volrath's Shapeshifter help dig for key pieces while also filling up the graveyard. Once the combo is assembled, the deck can generate infinite mana with cards like Phyrexian Devourer and use it to win the game with cards like Psychatog or Triskelion. The deck also includes disruptive elements like Cabal Therapy to disrupt opponents' strategies.

The deck aims to quickly assemble the combo of Phyrexian Dreadnought and Stifle to create a powerful threat while disrupting the opponent's game plan with counterspells and card draw. The focus is on controlling the game through counter magic and finding the combo pieces efficiently to win the game with a massive 12/12 trampler. The deck relies on speed, disruption, and efficient card selection to outmaneuver the opponent and secure victory.

This deck focuses on using enchantresses to draw cards whenever you cast an enchantment spell. By combining cards like Enchantress's Presence, Argothian Enchantress, and Mirri's Guile with powerful enchantments like Opalescence and Sterling Grove, you can control the board and overwhelm your opponent with a combination of card advantage and powerful enchantment effects. The deck also includes key pieces like Parallax Wave and Replenish to further enhance your enchantress strategy and maintain a strong presence on the battlefield.

This aggressive Goblin deck focuses on quickly flooding the board with inexpensive creatures like Goblin Lackey and Mogg Fanatic, while utilizing tribal synergies with cards like Goblin Warchief and Goblin Ringleader. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and consistent stream of threats, backed up by removal options like Gempalm Incinerator and Siege-Gang Commander. With added disruption from cards like Wasteland and Rishadan Port, this deck seeks to maintain pressure and control the battlefield to secure a swift victory.

This deck focuses on flooding the board with aggressive goblin creatures to quickly overwhelm the opponent. It utilizes mana denial with cards like Wasteland and Rishadan Port to disrupt the opponent's game plan, while also utilizing tutor effects like Goblin Matron to find key goblin creatures like Goblin Ringleader and Siege-Gang Commander. The deck also includes removal options like Mogg Fanatic and Gempalm Incinerator to keep the opponent's board under control. Overall, the strategy revolves around fast, efficient aggression and disruption to secure a quick victory.

The deck revolves around creating a lock using the Stasis enchantment to keep opponent's lands tapped and prevent them from playing spells. It utilizes cards like Gush and Portent to draw into key pieces, while also including countermagic and bounce spells to protect the combo. By managing resources effectively and comboing off at the right moment, this deck can quickly take control of the game and secure a victory through denying the opponent resources and opportunities to play spells.

The deck focuses on aggressive gameplay by using efficient creatures like Terravore and Treetop Village, supported by disruptive spells like Swords to Plowshares and Cataclysm. The strategy revolves around controlling the board with cards like Wasteland and Mox Diamond while utilizing the synergy between Land destruction effects and land-dependent creatures. The deck aims to quickly diminish the opponent's resources while maintaining a steady stream of threats to close out the game swiftly. Emphasis is placed on tempo and resource denial to overwhelm the opponent before they can stabilize.

The main concept of the deck is to use aggressive creatures like Nimble Mongoose and Terravore to put pressure on the opponent. The deck also includes disruptive cards like Swords to Plowshares and Armageddon to control the board and slow down the opponent. Additionally, the deck includes mana acceleration with Mox Diamond and land destruction with cards like Rishadan Port and Wasteland. The goal is to quickly establish board control and overwhelm the opponent before they can stabilize.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game through counterspells, removal spells, and powerful finishers like Exalted Angel and Decree of Justice. Standstill is used to slow down the game and generate card advantage, while Mishra's Factory and Faerie Conclave provide creature threats. The inclusion of Dust Bowl and Powder Keg allows for additional land destruction to disrupt the opponent's game plan. Overall, the deck aims to control the board and card advantage to outvalue the opponent and win through powerful finishers and resource denial.

The deck focuses on controlling the opponent's game plan by using counterspells, removal spells, and disruptive creatures like Meddling Mage. The key strategy is to efficiently draw cards using spells like Accumulated Knowledge and Gush to fuel the powerful Psychatog, a creature that can quickly become a lethal threat by discarding cards from the player's hand. Additionally, the deck includes a small land destruction package with Armageddon to disrupt the opponent's mana base. The goal is to outvalue and outmaneuver the opponent through card advantage and efficient threats.

The deck is focused on using Ill-Gotten Gains to combo off and win the game quickly. It utilizes cards like Brain Freeze and Dark Rituals to accelerate mana production and quickly mill out the opponent. The deck also includes cards like Cabal Ritual and Necrologia to help generate more resources and dig for key combo pieces. The main strategy revolves around casting Ill-Gotten Gains to return key combo pieces from the graveyard to hand, allowing for explosive turns and overwhelming the opponent with a flurry of spells.

This deck focuses on utilizing aggressive creatures and disruption spells to quickly overwhelm the opponent. By deploying threats like Hypnotic Specter and Black Knight alongside powerful removal spells like Smother and Diabolic Edict, the deck aims to apply pressure and disrupt the opponent's game plan. The inclusion of cards like Duress and Cabal Therapy also allows for targeted hand disruption, further hindering the opponent's ability to effectively respond. The mana base is streamlined with a focus on efficient black-producing lands, allowing for consistent deployment of threats and spells.

The primary strategy of this deck is to quickly establish board control and disrupt the opponent's resources through aggressive plays like Armageddon and Cataclysm, while utilizing land destruction and land recursion with cards like Rishadan Port, Weathered Wayfarer, and Terravore. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with efficient creatures like Exalted Angel and Treetop Village, while also benefiting from card advantage and selection with Sylvan Library and Gaea's Blessing. The inclusion of ramp and mana acceleration cards like Mox Diamond allows for a fast and powerful early game.

This deck focuses on deploying aggressive Goblin creatures quickly and efficiently to overwhelm the opponent. Key cards like Goblin Lackey, Goblin Warchief, and Goblin Ringleader help accelerate the deck's game plan by providing extra mana or drawing additional cards. Cards like Gempalm Incinerator and Siege-Gang Commander offer removal options and additional reach to close out games. The deck also includes utility cards like Naturalize and Rishadan Port to disrupt the opponent's strategy. Overall, the goal is to flood the board with Goblins and push through damage as quickly as possible.
